title: SWL 6-Pack Ribbon Cops Traditional Mixed – 10m x 5mm Each | Assorted Metallic & Holographic Gift Wrap Ribbons in Silver, Gold & Red | Perfect for Xmas Gift Wrapping, Crafts & Decorations
features: 🎀 COMPLETE RIBBON SET: Includes 6 assorted ribbon cops (10m x 5mm each) in a mix of metallic and holographic finishes, ideal for elevating your gift wrapping and crafts.

✨ PREMIUM QUALITY FINISH: Features 1 x Silver Holographic, 1 x Silver Metallic, 1 x Gold Holographic, 1 x Gold Metallic, 1 x Red Holographic, and 1 x Red Metallic ribbon for a variety of festive looks.
🎁 PERFECT FOR GIFT WRAPPING: Ideal for Christmas presents, birthday gifts, hampers, party favours, and decorative packaging, adding a luxurious finishing touch to every gift.
🪩 VERSATILE USES: Great for craft projects, DIY décor, floral arrangements, card making, and party decorations — suitable for both festive and year-round use.
📏 CONVENIENT & READY TO USE: Each ribbon measures 10m in length and 5mm in width, and the compact 15.5 × 4.5 × 19 cm pack is easy to store and perfect for all your creative projects.
description: Add the perfect finishing touch to your presents and creative projects with the SWL 6-Pack Ribbon Cops Traditional Mixed Set — a versatile and stylish ribbon collection designed for gift wrapping, crafts, and décor. This premium set includes 6 assorted ribbon cops (10m x 5mm each) in a mix of holographic and metallic finishes: 1 x Silver Holographic 1 x Silver Metallic 1 x Gold Holographic 1 x Gold Metallic 1 x Red Holographic 1 x Red Metallic Perfect for Christmas gifts, birthday presents, hampers, party decorations, and seasonal crafts, these ribbons add a festive sparkle and elegant finishing touch to any project. They’re also ideal for DIY décor, floral arrangements, card making, and other creative uses. With a compact pack size of 15.5 × 4.5 × 19.0 cm, these ribbons are easy to store and ready to use whenever inspiration strikes. 🎁 Why You’ll Love It: 6 assorted ribbons in metallic and holographic finishes Perfect for festive gift wrapping and crafts 10m length and 5mm width each Elegant and versatile for all occasions
